title: What appears risky, unsupported or contradictory in these documents?

messages.content:
Third Party & Vendor Management Policy of Grambling State University Information Technology: 2 risk(s), 6 gap(s) and 6 mitigation action(s) identified. Top risk: Violation of this Policy may result in disciplinary action which may include termination for employees, termination of business relationships for contractors or consultants Main evidence gap: Effective date of the policy

Highlights:
- Violation of this Policy may result in disciplinary action which may include termination for employees, termination of business relationships for contractors or consultants
- Individuals are subject to loss of Grambling State University information resources, access privileges, and potential civil and criminal prosecution
- Effective date of the policy
- Revision date for version 1.0

Recommendation: Each third party user with access to Grambling State University sensitive information must be cleared to handle that information
What must third party personnel do if they identify a security incident?
Third party personnel must report all security incidents directly to their assigned point of contact.
